_comment: Reference copy of MCP tool registrations. The authoritative runtime config is baked into the Docker image (Dockerfile.claude) and wraps each server with mcp-watchdog. This file documents the tool schemas so the agent can read them via the docs MCP tool.

tools.name: read_workspace_file
tools.description: Reads the contents of a file from the secure workspace.

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: Recursively lists all files and directories in the workspace.

tools.name: create_file
tools.description: Creates a new empty file in the workspace.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Overwrites the entire content of a file with new content.

tools.name: delete_file
tools.description: Removes a file from the workspace.

tools.name: grep_files
tools.description: Search all files in the workspace for lines matching a regexp pattern. Returns results as 'file:lineno: line' strings.

pattern.description: Regular expression pattern to search for

max_results.description: Maximum number of matching lines to return (default 100)

tools.name: replace_in_file
tools.description: Replace all occurrences of old_string with new_string in a file. Returns the number of replacements made. Fails if zero matches found.

tools.name: append_file
tools.description: Appends content to an existing (or new) file. Returns the number of bytes written.

tools.name: create_directory
tools.description: Creates a new directory in the workspace.

tools.name: git_status
tools.description: Show working tree status (short format). Returns list of changed files with status codes.

submodule_path.description: Optional submodule path relative to workspace root (e.g. 'cluster/agent'). If omitted, operates on the root repository.

tools.name: git_diff
tools.description: Show file differences. By default shows unstaged changes. Set staged=true to see changes staged for commit.

staged.description: If true, show staged (cached) changes instead of unstaged.

submodule_path.description: Optional submodule path relative to workspace root (e.g. 'cluster/agent'). If omitted, operates on the root repository.

tools.name: git_add
tools.description: Stage files for the next commit. Pass paths relative to workspace root. Use ["."] to stage all changes. Auto-detects the owning submodule from file paths; all paths must belong to the same repository.

paths.description: File paths to stage, relative to workspace root. Use ["."] for all.

tools.name: git_commit
tools.description: Create a commit with staged changes. Requires a non-empty commit message.

submodule_path.description: Optional submodule path relative to workspace root (e.g. 'cluster/agent'). If omitted, commits to the root repository.

tools.name: git_log
tools.description: Show recent commits (oneline format). Returns up to max_count commits.

max_count.description: Number of commits to show (default 10, max 50).

submodule_path.description: Optional submodule path relative to workspace root (e.g. 'cluster/agent'). If omitted, shows log for the root repository.

tools.name: git_reset_soft
tools.description: Undo the last N commits, keeping all changes staged. Cannot reset past the baseline commit that existed at startup — only commits created during this session can be undone.

count.description: Number of commits to undo (default 1, max 5).

submodule_path.description: Optional submodule path relative to workspace root (e.g. 'cluster/agent'). If omitted, resets the root repository.

tools.name: list_docs
tools.description: List available documentation files

tools.name: read_doc
tools.description: Read a documentation file

tools.name: plan_current
tools.description: Get the current task from the active plan

tools.name: plan_list
tools.description: List all plans

tools.name: plan_complete
tools.description: Mark the current task as completed

tools.name: plan_block
tools.description: Mark the current task as blocked

tools.name: plan_create
tools.description: Create a new plan with goal and tasks

tools.name: plan_update_task
tools.description: Update a task's fields

tools.name: run_tests
tools.description: Starts an async test run against the current workspace. Returns immediately with status 'started'. Poll get_test_results to check outcome. Returns 409 if a run is already in progress.

tools.name: get_test_results
tools.description: Returns the result of the most recent test run as JSON with fields: status (pass/fail/running/pending), exit_code, timestamp, output.
